title: quercus × tridentata
intro: Quercus × tridentata, also known as the coast live oak, is a hybrid evergreen tree that belongs to the white oak group and is native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor infections. The health benefits of Quercus × tridentata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Quercus × tridentata can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
